message:
fix(fr-command): XSETID upstream-parity validation: ENTRIESADDED, MAXDELETEDID, no-such-key wording (br-frankenredis-r71v)

Upstream t_stream.c::xsetidCommand validates each option strictly,
requires ENTRIESADDED >= 0, parses MAXDELETEDID as a stream ID,
rejects when last-id < max_deleted_entry_id, and routes the
missing-key case through shared.nokeyerr ("ERR no such key").
Our XSETID was accepting both options without value validation
and emitting a FrankenRedis-specific "not present in the target
stream" error for the missing-key case.

- Validate ENTRIESADDED has a value present and >= 0
  ("ERR entries_added must be positive" when negative)
- Validate MAXDELETEDID has a value present and is a strict
  stream ID; reject last-id < max_deleted_entry_id with the
  upstream wording
  ("ERR The ID specified in XSETID is smaller than the
  provided max_deleted_entry_id")
- Missing key now returns "ERR no such key" matching upstream
- 3 new fr-command tests pin the upstream wording verbatim
- core_stream.json: update xsetid_nonexistent_stream fixture

fr-command 644 passed; fr-conformance 183 passed.

Slice of br-frankenredis-r71v (Redis 7+ surface reality-check).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
